name: tokenmaxxing-ai
description: Token-efficient AI coding-agent workflows for simplifying code and reviewing repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Simplify and review code with approval-first workflows and adaptive project memory.
interface.longDescription: Tokenmaxxing AI provides portable coding-agent workflows for finding over-engineered code, reviewing codebases with lite/mid/ultra effort, asking for approval before edits, and verifying changes after implementation. Commands read and update .tokenmaxxing.md — a project-local adaptive memory file that records run counts, verification commands, recurring risks, false positives, and instruction adjustments so repeated runs improve over time.
defaultPrompt: Use tokenmaxxing-ai:simplify on this module and update .tokenmaxxing.md when done.
Use tokenmaxxing-ai:review ultra for this repo and update .tokenmaxxing.md.
